content.speakerText: Hey Alex, thanks for coming in — how’s it going?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，亚历克斯，谢谢你能来，最近怎么样？

options.text: I'm fine, thanks. Let's get straight to business.
Pretty good, thanks! Just glad to be here.
I don't know, maybe next week?
Can you send me the agenda first?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Pretty good, thanks! Just glad to be here.' 符合轻松寒暄的语境，回应了对方的关心并表达积极态度。选项1虽然语法正确，但语气过于正式生硬，不符合开场寒暄的轻松氛围。选项3和4完全偏离了问候意图，属于无效回应。

content.speakerText: I know this time of year’s busy — appreciate you making room for this.
content.speakerTextCn: 我知道这会儿大家都忙，谢谢你抽出时间。

options.text: Of course! This is important to me.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Of course! This is important to me.' 表达了感激和重视，符合积极回应的社交礼仪。选项1只是附和，未回应对方的感谢，缺乏互动性。选项3带有消极情绪，暗示被迫参与，不符合职场积极沟通原则。选项4直接要求改期，与对方表达的感激完全矛盾。

content.speakerText: Morning, Jamie! How was your weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，杰米！周末过得怎么样？

options.text: I had a meeting at 9 AM.
It was relaxing! I went hiking and caught up with friends.
I need to finish the report by Monday.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'It was relaxing! I went hiking and caught up with friends.' 自然回应了寒暄问题，分享了个人经历，符合轻松社交语境。选项1和4是工作内容，忽略了寒暄意图。选项3语气生硬，带有防御性，破坏了友好氛围。

content.template: Hey, thanks for coming in — how’s it ___?
content.hint: 这是英语中问候对方近况最常用的表达方式
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：how's it going?（日常问候句型）

content.template: ___ problem at all — I actually wanted to talk to you too.
content.hint: 这是对感谢的常见礼貌回应，强调没有负担
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：No problem at all（礼貌回应感谢）

content.template: I'm ___ well, thank you. Looking forward to our chat.
content.hint: 表达‘我很好’时，常用动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：be doing well（描述状态）

content.speakerText: Hey Alex, thanks for coming in — how’s it going?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，亚历克斯，谢谢你能来，最近怎么样？
expectedAnswers: Pretty good, thanks! Glad to be here.
I'm doing well — really appreciate you taking the time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了问候并表达积极态度
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常职场寒暄语气，是否避免生硬或过度正式

content.speakerText: I know this time of year’s busy — appreciate you making room for this.
content.speakerTextCn: 我知道这会儿大家都忙，谢谢你抽出时间。
expectedAnswers: Of course! This is important to me too.
No problem — I’ve been looking forward to this chat.
Sure thing! Happy to make time for something meaningful.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感激并体现主动重视
语言准确性：是否正确使用礼貌回应结构
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'of course', 'no problem', 'sure thing' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Morning, Sam! How was your week?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，萨姆！你这周过得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: It was good, thanks! A bit hectic, but productive.
Pretty solid — got a lot done and even had time for coffee with Lisa.
Not too bad! Ready to tackle the rest of the week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了问候并提供适度个人反馈
语言准确性：语法结构是否自然，避免中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达如 'a bit hectic', 'pretty solid', 'tackle the week'
